message:
test(info): add unit tests for infoCommand and formatInfoHuman

- Test JSON output format with all expected fields
- Test human-readable output sections (Configuration, Environment, Dependencies)
- Test display of API key status, cass CLI, Bun, Node.js
- Test playbook and config path display
- Improve coverage from 49.13% to 92.62% line coverage

Closes: cass_memory_system-di7y
